content.content: Forward who also goes by Nano and is famous for his club career. He signed with La Liga club SD Eibar in 2016, and subsequently played on loan with Levante and Sporting Gijon. He began his youth soccer career in 2006 with Tenerife. He also played in the youth academies of Coromoto and Padre Anchieta. He played for Tenerife's senior squad between 2013 and 2016. He was born and raised in La Laguna of the Canary Islands, Spain. He andSergi Gomezare both famous soccer stars known for having played in La Liga.
